creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 214423
py-jsonfield-3.1.0.patch

Hi Sunpoet,

attached is the patch that updates www/py-jsonfield to 3.1.0 and assigns it to Django 2.2 (current LTS release) by syncing it with the repo-copied port www/py-dj22-django-jsonfield. 

The latter one is also set as deprecated because it will be obsolete once www/py-jsonfield gets assigned to Django 2.2.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.3-RELEASE amd64 for each py36, py37 and py38 flavor) -> OK
- portlint -> OK
